title: barleria aenea
intro: Barleria aenea, also known as the copper barleria or golden copper barleria, is a perennial plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Barleria aenea include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antidiarrheal agent. The herbal preparations of Barleria aenea include infusion, decoction, and paste, which are often used in traditional remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
